publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This XML file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation by the library in the upper right corner.

binding.decoNote: The manuscript seems to have been rebound by the library.

history.provenance: The manuscript belonged to a church in the area, from where it was taken by and brought to . It was then looted by the British Napier expedition in 1868.

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.
